section.heading: Dissemination of research results

content.p: The Director of the Institute shall disseminate the results of research conducted under section 285e–5 of this title and this section to appropriate professional entities and to the public.

section.sourceCredit: (July 1, 1944, ch. 373, title IV, § 445D, formerly Pub. L. 99–660, title IX, § 942, Nov. 14, 1986, 100 Stat. 3809; renumbered § 445D of act July 1, 1944, and amended Pub. L. 100–607, title I, § 142(a), (d)(3), Nov. 4, 1988, 102 Stat. 3057, 3058.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 11242 of this title prior to renumbering by Pub. L. 100–607.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1988—Pub. L. 100–607, § 142(a), renumbered section 11242 of this title as this section.
Pub. L. 100–607, § 142(d)(3), substituted “the Institute” for “the National Institute on Aging” and “section 285e–5 of this title and this section” for “this part”.
